disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: ‘Stabilized’: Update on person who tested positive for Hantavirus strain in Island Health - CHEK News
updates.body_en: ‘Stabilized’: Update on person who tested positive for Hantavirus strain in Island Health CHEK News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大岛健康局一例汉坦病毒感染者病情稳定。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship triggers painful memories for Bend family - KTVZ
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship triggers painful memories for Bend family KTVZ
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮汉坦病毒疫情勾起美国本德家庭痛苦回忆。

updates.title_en: Cruise Ship Undergoes Additional Cleaning Following Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak - University of Nebraska Medical Center
updates.body_en: Cruise Ship Undergoes Additional Cleaning Following Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak University of Nebraska Medical Center
updates.summary_zh: 内布拉斯加医学中心称邮轮致命疫情后加强清洁。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship grows to 13 cases - CIDRAP
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship grows to 13 cases CIDRAP Spanish citizen evacuated from hantavirus-hit cruise ship tests positive CNN Hantavirus cases from cruise outbreak rise to 13 following new case in Spain, WHO says NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮汉坦病毒疫情增至13例，西班牙公民确诊。

updates.title_en: WHO Reports 13 Hantavirus Cases Tied to Cruise Ship Cluster - Morocco World News
updates.body_en: WHO Reports 13 Hantavirus Cases Tied to Cruise Ship Cluster Morocco World News
updates.summary_zh: WHO 报告邮轮聚集性疫情共 13 例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: MV Hondius Cruise Ship Will Proceed with Next Voyage 34 Days After Hantavirus Outbreak Passengers Disembarked - People.com
updates.body_en: MV Hondius Cruise Ship Will Proceed with Next Voyage 34 Days After Hantavirus Outbreak Passengers Disembarked People.com
updates.summary_zh: MV Hondius 邮轮在疫情暴发 34 天后将恢复航行。

updates.title_en: Health Officials Monitor Hantavirus Cases in UK - Pharmacy Business
updates.body_en: Health Officials Monitor Hantavirus Cases in UK Pharmacy Business
updates.summary_zh: 英国卫生官员监测汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus: Case count hits 13 as another MV Hondius passenger tests positive in Spain; situation stable, says WHO - Mint
updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Case count hits 13 as another MV Hondius passenger tests positive in Spain; situation stable, says WHO Mint
updates.summary_zh: 西班牙新增 1 例 MV Hondius 乘客确诊，病例总数达 13 例，WHO 称情况稳定。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship outbreak rise to 13 - politico.eu
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship outbreak rise to 13 politico.eu
updates.summary_zh: 与邮轮疫情相关的汉坦病毒病例升至 13 例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases from cruise outbreak rise to 13 following new case in Spain, WHO says - NBC News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases from cruise outbreak rise to 13 following new case in Spain, WHO says NBC News
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称西班牙邮轮暴发汉坦病毒病例升至13例。

updates.title_en: Kansas extends emergency declaration after 3 residents exposed to hantavirus - KCUR
updates.body_en: Kansas extends emergency declaration after 3 residents exposed to hantavirus KCUR
updates.summary_zh: 美国堪萨斯州因3名居民接触汉坦病毒延长紧急状态。

updates.title_en: Kennedy offers legal shield to develop hantavirus treatment - Axios
updates.body_en: Kennedy offers legal shield to develop hantavirus treatment Axios
updates.summary_zh: 肯尼迪提供法律保护以开发汉坦病毒疗法。

updates.title_en: Saskatoon researchers in ‘very early stages’ of animal testing for hantavirus vaccine - Global News
updates.body_en: Saskatoon researchers in ‘very early stages’ of animal testing for hantavirus vaccine Global News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大萨斯卡通研究人员对汉坦病毒疫苗进行动物测试。
